risks.title: Competition from Air Belgium
risks.description: Lufthansa faces increased competition from Air Belgium, which could potentially erode market share and profitability.
risks.evidence: Lufthansa bekommt Konkurrenz durch Air Belgium - DER SPIEGEL

risks.title: Global Competition from Emirates and Co.
risks.description: Lufthansa faces severe competition from airlines like Emirates, especially on lucrative routes to Asia, South America, and Africa.
risks.evidence: Streit um Drehkreuze  Emirates und Co. setzen Lufthansa zu

risks.title: Unfair Competition Allegations
risks.description: Lufthansa faces allegations of unfair competition from Air France-KLM, which could lead to regulatory issues and damage to reputation.
risks.evidence: Unfairer Wettbewerb  Lufthansa und Air France-KLM...

risks.title: Poor Customer Service and Reputation
risks.description: Lufthansa has a reputation for poor customer service, which could negatively impact customer loyalty and revenue.
risks.evidence: Read Customer Service Reviews of www.lufthansa.com - Trustpilot

opportunities.title: Digital Transformation through AI
opportunities.description: Lufthansa should prioritize AI adoption for efficiency, customer satisfaction, and revenue growth.
opportunities.evidence: Neumann on technologies Lufthansa Systems is prioritising

opportunities.title: Fleet Modernization and Expansion
opportunities.description: Upgrading and expanding the fleet with modern, fuel-efficient aircraft will enhance passenger experience and reduce environmental impact.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa - Strategic Analysis and Outlook Report 2026

opportunities.title: Cost Optimization and Job Reduction
opportunities.description: Implementing AI and other digital technologies can help reduce costs, streamline processes, and align the workforce with changing business needs.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa Turns to AI, Cuts 4,000 Jobs in Major Overhaul

opportunities.title: Expansion into Growing Markets
opportunities.description: Lufthansa should focus on strategic partnerships and investments in Asia, South America, and Africa to capitalize on emerging markets and demand for air travel.

trends.title: AI Integration for Optimized Operations
trends.description: Lufthansa is heavily investing in AI to improve operational efficiency and agility.
trends.evidence: Lufthansa Leveraging AI to optimise airline operations, AI Aviation Lab - Lufthansa Group Innovation Runway

trends.title: Environmental Sustainability Focus
trends.description: Lufthansa Group is emphasizing sustainability through fleet modernization, SAF adoption, and investments in innovation.
trends.evidence: Nachhaltigkeit bei Lufthansa Group   moderne Flotte   Innovationen, Lufthansa Group achieves financial turnaround in 2022 with Adjusted EBIT of 1.5 billion euros

trends.title: Fleet Modernization and Investment
trends.description: Lufthansa is undergoing comprehensive fleet modernization and investing in organizational changes to improve efficiency and profitability.
trends.evidence: Lufthansa - Strategic Analysis and Outlook Report  2026, Lufthansa CEO Optimistic About Mainline Profitability In 2026

trends.title: Customer-Centric Service Improvements
trends.description: Lufthansa aims to deliver a high-quality travel experience for passengers through investments in product development and improvement.
trends.evidence: Lufthansa Airlines Travel Experience   Passenger Review Guide, Lufthansa - Strategic Analysis and Outlook Report  2026
